comment.body: She's new to Substack (as I am as well). I'm sure she will refine the system down as she goes along. One thing is that post you tagged probably should've been made in the "trade signals" thread. Also, having a "member's questions" thread along with a "general thread" might help to clarify the confusion a bit more. She could then set tighter parameters as to what is a legitmate and helpful question to answer, and delete all the other ones about AMD/stock recos lol. I'm sure she'll adjust and clean things up. comment.body:
FWIW my iwm trade in puts is a mean reversion trade but has nothing to do with what Alma’s posting. So I am sorry for posting that. I won’t post unrelated things going forward 

After following Alma for a very long time - my advice is to track against SPX/SPY. Her comments relate to the dealer flow etc happening there. Other stocks and tickers are unique and though they can be correlated it is best to trade the SPX/spy if you’re following her signals

comment.body:
Just an idea to make chats/threads more efficient:

1. Subscribers can pay an additional $1 or $2 per month to hire an assistant who works one hour per day.
2. Separate chat groups:
    - Alma's Channels: could have several such as educational contents, trading signals, Q&A, etc. Only Alma and the assistant can post here.
    - Subscriber Channels: A space for us to discuss freely and help each other. The assistant will spend one hour per day selecting valuable questions or topics and forwarding them to Alma for answers in Alma's Q&A channel.
